_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: Auto Gate using Servo + HC-SR04
subtitle: Smart gate opens automatically!
overview: Students will build an automatic gate system using an ultrasonic sensor and servo motor. When an object comes within 10cm, the gate opens automatically. When the object moves away, the gate closes.

images._note: Add actual project images from the session

gallery.caption: Servo motor rotates the gate arm
Breadboard setup for the auto gate circuit

keyTopics: Automatic gate systems in real life

youtubeVideos.title: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sensor Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how the ultrasonic sensor detects distance.

youtubeVideos.title: Servo Motor with Arduino
youtubeVideos.desc: Understanding servo motor movement using Arduino.

activity.title: Build an Auto Gate System
steps: Connect the ultrasonic sensor to Arduino
Place an object near the sensor
When object comes within 10cm → gate opens

quiz.q: What does the HC-SR04 sensor detect?
quiz.explanation: HC-SR04 is an ultrasonic sensor that measures distance.

quiz.q: What happens when an object comes within 10cm?
quiz.explanation: The servo motor rotates and opens the gate.
The servo motor controls the gate movement.

quiz.q: What happens when the object moves away?
quiz.explanation: The servo rotates back and closes the gate.

quiz.q: Which board controls the whole project?
quiz.explanation: Arduino UNO acts as the brain of the system.
